## Meeting Purpose

[Team training on client onboarding process and standardizing account management practices.](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New streamlined Notion template introduced for client workspaces with simplified sections](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Automated workflows demonstrated for company research, competitor analysis, and kickoff agenda creation](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Emphasis on consistent weekly client updates, thorough documentation, and proactive communication](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Action item: Team to review and update all client Notion spaces by Monday to ensure completeness](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### New Notion Template for Client Workspaces

  - [Simplified sections: Internal Docs, Client-Facing Space (Docs, Meeting Tasks, Weekly Updates, Performance Reports)](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Template located in Templates section, starred for easy access](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Encouragement to suggest improvements and alignments on standard practices](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Automated Workflows for Client Research

  - [Company Brief: Analyzes intro call transcript, website, generates AI context summary](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Direct Competitors: Identifies and analyzes main competitors](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Audience Competitors: Analyzes search queries to find content competitors](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Kickoff Agenda: Compiles research into structured meeting agenda](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)

### Client Communication Standards

  - [Weekly updates mandatory, separate from meeting notes](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Updates should recap previous week, set goals for current week](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Meetings focused on relationship building, strategy alignment, not status updates](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Importance of thorough documentation in Notion, Airtable, and published content](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)

### Account Management Best Practices

  - [Proactive communication, especially for bottlenecks or quality issues](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [Building early value and trust to overcome potential early-stage challenges](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Conducting additional research (e.g., SEMrush analysis) before kickoff calls](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Properly managing stakeholder information and access in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)

### Upcoming Process Improvements

  - [Plans to improve task and project management tracking](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=2860.0)
  - [Future training on new article generation and assignment creation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=2740.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to review and update all client Notion spaces by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Ensure all accounts have up-to-date weekly updates, meeting notes, and performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=3800.0)
  - [Two-hour follow-up training scheduled for next Friday, potentially starting at 9 AM Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=3761.0)
  - [Focus on delivering quality content and meeting publishing goals, rather than creating large backlogs of assignments](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=3840.0)
  - [Account reviews to begin on Mondays](https://fathom.video/share/vYxzeLtz1iUxVJWqaybAgGGmWTGrK_-u?tab=summary&timestamp=3908.0)
